message:
test(codegen): verify COUNT(*) cheapest-index selection via opcode inspection

bd-wwqen.1: Add two codegen-level tests that build SELECT COUNT(*)
ASTs directly and inspect the compiled VDBE program:

- test_count_star_opens_cheapest_index_not_table: creates a schema
  with table (root=2) and index (root=3), verifies OpenRead targets
  the index root page and the Count opcode is present
- test_count_star_uses_table_when_no_index: creates a schema with
  no indexes, verifies OpenRead falls back to the table root page

These validate the cheapest-index selection at the codegen level
without going through the full query execution path.

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Update bd-wwqen.2 issue comments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
